title: Cardboard Cutout Mon [Cobblemon]
description: Adds more distinct placeholder images to all of the un-modeled pokémon in Cobblemon.
body:
# Cardboard Cutout Mon
### ![logo](https://i.imgur.com/5Hqc42Q.png) For [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)! ![logo](https://i.imgur.com/5Hqc42Q.png)

This resource pack replaces most placeholder models with unique sprites! Currently covers all unmodeled pokémon up to Eternatus.

![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3jLwYSll/images/5233524cb83958e728729cacaef15a15fbabe046.png)
![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3jLwYSll/images/dc45c91f2c38b567d12bf4b597445bdcc79f25af.png)
